title: Aasa Patta Ellathayum Lyrics Viyabari
stanzas:
aasa patta ellaathaiyum
kaasu irundha vaangalaam
ammaava vaanga mudiyuma?
neeyum
ammaava vaanga mudiyuma?

aayiram uravu unna
thaedi vandhe ninnaalum
thaai pole
thaanga mudiyuma?

unnaiyum ennaiyum
padaichathinge yaaruda
deivam ovvoru veettilum
irukkuthunaa thaaiyadaa

aasa patta ellaathaiyum
kaasu irundha vaangalaam
ammaava vaanga mudiyuma?
neeyum
ammaava vaanga mudiyuma?

pattiniya kedanthaalum
pillaiku paal koduppaa
paal kudikkum pilla mugam
paathu pasi marappaa

ilavattam aana pinnum
ennai thaechi kulikkavaipa
uchi mudham padham vara
uchukotti magizhnthiduva

nenjile nadakkavaippa
nilava pudikkavaippa
pinju viral nagam kadippaa
pillaiecha soru thinbaa

pallu mulaika nellu mudiya
mella mellathaan keerividuvaa

unnaiyum ennaiyum
padaichathinge yaaruda
deivam ovvoru veettilum
irukkuthunaa thaaiyadaa

aasa patta ellaathaiyum
kaasu irundha vaangalaam
ammaava vaanga mudiyuma?
nee
ammaava vaanga mudiyuma?

mannil oru chedi mulaicha
mannukathu prasavam thaan.
unnai pera thudithudichaa
annaikathu boogambamthaan

sooriyana suthikitte
thannai suthum boomiyamma
pethedutha pillai suthi
pithukollum thaaimaiyammaa

garpathil nelintha unnai
nutpamaai thottu rasippa
pedhai pol aval iruppaa
medhaiyaai unai valarppaa

enna vendum ini unakku
annai madiyil sorgam irukku.

unnaiyum ennaiyum
padaichathinge yaaruda
deivam ovvoru veettilum
irukkuthunaa thaaiyadaa

aasa patta ellaathaiyum
kaasu irundha vaangalaam
ammaava vaanga mudiyuma?
neeyum
ammaava vaanga mudiyuma?

aayiram uravu unna
thaedi vandhe ninnaalum
thaai pole
thaanga mudiyuma?

unnaiyum ennaiyum
padaichathinge yaaruda
deivam ovvoru veettilum
irukkuthunaa thaaiyadaa

seo.title: Aasa Patta Ellathayum Lyrics Viyabari

enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the heartfelt emotions of Aasa Patta Ellathayum, a soul-stirring melody from the movie Viyabari. Sung by the legendary Hariharan and composed by the maestro Deva, this song captures the essence of longing and emotional depth. Dive into the captivating world of Tamil cinema with this unforgettable musical masterpiece.
stanzaMeanings: You can buy everything you desire if you have money, but can you buy a mother? Can you become a mother?
Thousands of relationships may come seeking you, but can they endure like a mother?
Who created you and me? It's the mother who is present in every home.
You can buy everything you desire if you have money, but can you buy a mother? Can you become a mother?
Even if she is starving, she will give milk to her child. Seeing the child's face while drinking milk, she forgets her hunger.
Even after becoming old, she will bathe you and care for you, kissing your forehead and feet, expressing her joy.
She will make you walk in her heart, catch the moon for you, and feed you with her tender fingers.
When your teeth grow, she will gently cut the rice grains for you.
Who created you and me? It's the mother who is present in every home.
You can buy everything you desire if you have money, but can you buy a mother? Can you become a mother?
When a plant sprouts in the soil, it's the soil's birth. When she struggles to give birth to you, it's an earthquake for her.
The earth revolves around the sun, and the mother revolves around her child, showing her maternal love.
She will touch and enjoy you with affection while you are in her womb, raising you with wisdom.
What more do you need now? Heaven lies in your mother's lap.
Who created you and me? It's the mother who is present in every home.
You can buy everything you desire if you have money, but can you buy a mother? Can you become a mother?
Thousands of relationships may come seeking you, but can they endure like a mother?
Who created you and me? It's the mother who is present in every home.
